title: Carbon Fibre Prepreg Out-of-Autoclave Cure Cycle Optimisation
content: Out-of-autoclave (OOA) CFRP cure of Hexply M21/T800: ramp 2 °C/min to 120 °C under vacuum ≥ 0.85 bar absolute; dwell 60 min; ramp 2 °C/min to 180 °C; dwell 120 min; cool ≤ 3 °C/min to 60 °C then vent. Exothermic peak at 135–145 °C can cause thermal runaway if ramp exceeds 3 °C/min. Void content < 1% requires continuous vacuum throughout heat-up. Pressure cascade control: outer loop tracks temperature ramp profile; inner loop maintains vacuum setpoint.
